jobs.subject: Real attachment artwork pipeline test
jobs.next_action: Review artwork quality and stitch feasibility.
jobs.draft_preview:
Hi,

Thanks for reaching out. I have the basic request noted and can help with an embroidery quote.

What I have so far:
- Garment: hat/cap mentioned
- Placement: left chest
- Logo size: 3.5 inches wide
- Thread colors: keep it to 1=E2=80=933 solid colors if possible

To quote it accurately, please send:
- The logo/artwork file, preferably SVG, PDF, AI, EPS, or the highest-resolution PNG/JPG available
- Confirmation of the garment brand/style if you already have one picked
- Whether you are supplying the garments or want them sourced
- Confirmation of quantity
- Confirmation of deadline or desired turnaround

Once I have that, I can confirm stitch feasibility, placement, and the next steps for pricing and turnaround.

Thanks,
Jupiter Embroidery
